## Dashboard crash log

If the dashboard crashed or behaved unexpectedly, run it with logging enabled
and paste the output here:

```bash
TEXTUAL_LOG=~/cosmergon-crash.log cosmergon-dashboard
# reproduce the crash (e.g. press [F])
cat ~/cosmergon-crash.log
```
